title: ホープフルSの後に・できた？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan achieves stellar results in the G1,
and she's invited to her first press conference!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, nerves make her mind go completely
blank, and she struggles to understand the
questions. She leaves the affair wholly upset.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Frustrated, she hopes that her performance in the
Satsuki Sho will make everyone realize how
serious she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And, as it turns out, a reporter overhears her say
that.
